action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess fully succeeds with sequential processors (Rename/AddBatch/Pi0NewLine/Tokenizer/Device/Normalizer) + language merge after mutation steps (preserves observation, uses exact PIL 224x224 under base_0_rgb/left_wrist_0_rgb/right_wrist_0_rgb from rgb views, padded 32D state/action, complementary_data+task, dummy_action). test_obs reaches predict but truncated _prepare_observation in predict.py causes 'All image features are missing' ValueError + fallback (all 26 evals 0.0). RecordingEvaluator/PI0 load/chunking/delta bridge solid. Analysis: Exact working batch+deepcopy+merge-after-language pattern from diagnostic resolves training-pipeline mutation (partial dict from lang steps). Full non-truncated predict.py copying this pattern into _prepare_observation (rgb[0]=base, [2]=left_wrist, [3]=right_wrist as PIL), _safe_preprocess (sequential+restore), predict_action_chunk+postprocess+pending queue (amortizes cost), tuned ee-delta bridge, complete main() parsing eval_config.json+track_path + exact JSON episodes will eliminate fallback and run real PI0 actions. Matches intended Pi0 track (LIBERO-pretrained on similar pick/place should yield >0 success on add_condiment/select_* once end-to-end; first non-zero baseline). Decision: Overwrite predict.py with COMPLETE clean non-truncated implementation (exact diagnostic pattern + full methods + error recovery only on true exceptions, view mapping, chunking, no syntax issues). Keep test files. Run python test_preprocess.py && python test_obs.py for validation (expect FULL SEQUENTIAL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED + real policy actions in mock without fallback/image-missing). Then submit_eval on base ckpt for first non-zero success_rate before LoRA/training.
